rules.name: No trivial assertions
rules.description: Tests must validate behavior or data, not mere element existence

rules.name: No arbitrary waits
rules.description: Never use page.waitForTimeout() without a preceding condition wait

rules.name: Evidence capture required
rules.description: Every test must capture at least one screenshot or network log as evidence
rules.check: test body must contain page.screenshot() OR page.waitForResponse() with capture

rules.name: Error path coverage
rules.description: For every positive test, there must be a corresponding negative/error test

rules.name: Cleanup required for mutations
rules.description: Tests that create or modify data must clean up or use unique identifiers
rules.check: if test contains POST/PATCH/PUT/DELETE, must have afterEach/afterAll cleanup

rules.name: Vietnamese text assertions
rules.description: Text assertions involving Vietnamese must use exact UTF-8 strings, not regex approximations

rules.name: Assertion specificity
rules.description: Assertions must check specific values, not just that something changed

rules.name: Independent tests
rules.description: Each test must be runnable in isolation. No ordering dependencies between tests.
